title: alsophila poiensis
intro: Alsophila poiensis, also known as the Kiokio or Palm Tree fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Alsophila poiensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Alsophila poiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional Maori medicine.
